mapper.select: SELECT * FROM news_dynamic ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO news_dynamic (id, title, content, cover_image, source, author_name, is_published, published_at, created_by) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{content}, #{coverImage}, #{source}, #{authorName}, #{isPublished}, NOW(), #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE news_dynamic SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, source = #{source}, author_name = #{authorName}, is_published = #{isPublished}, published_at = IF(#{isPublished}=1 AND is_published=0, NOW(), published_at), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE news_dynamic SET id = id - 1 WHERE id > #{afterId}
